title: scrollnote
description: a simple mod that allows you to scroll to change pitch of a note block
body:
## scrollnote

This mod allows you to scroll on a note block to change the pitch of it. This mod is pretty much wip, and only have 1 feature, but I will probably add more soon.

Fabric API is required.


## demo

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/KaKy-e8tW9Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
